## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] Feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Build / CI
- [ ] Refactor (no functional change)
- [ ] Security fix
- [ ] Breaking change (requires a migration note)

## Contributor checklist

- [ ] I have read the [Code of Conduct](../CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md) and [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] Commits follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
- [ ] This PR contains one logical change (split unrelated work into separate PRs)
- [ ] No generated artifacts, build outputs, or ISO/IMG files are committed
- [ ] No secrets, seed phrases, passphrases, tokens, or private keys are included
